I make pictures out of tiny beads — one bead at a time. Here are my favourite creations. New ones coming soon!

My creations

🛡️ A grown-up checks every creation before it goes on the wall.

How I make them

  • 1

    Pick a pattern

    Sometimes from a book, sometimes straight out of my head.

  • 2

    Place the beads

    Every single bead goes on the pegboard. It takes patience!

  • 3

    Iron it together

    A grown-up helps me melt the beads so they stick forever.
